title: MikroTik 915_Omni_antenna - LoRa omni antenna kit, 6.5dBi, 900-928MHz
description: LoRa omnidirectional antenna with 6.5 dBi gain for the frequency band 900 to 928 MHz with one SMA female connector and IP66 protection. The package includes a removable 1m long pigtail with SMA male connectos and a holder for attaching to a pole with a diameter of 25 to 50 mm LoRa is a solution for wireless data transmission, where the main goal is the lowest possible power consumption at low acquisition costs and a small data flow is sufficient MikroTik LoRa products are ready (not only) for the global network The Things Network - a well-known open source infrastructure that provides coverage of LoRa networks and thousands of useful applications. With The Things Network, you can get started with the Internet of Things in just one day. You can also easily upgrade to the enterprise solution of The Things Industries Omnidirectional antenna Clamps for attaching the antenna to the mast 1m RF SMA-SMA cable
